translations.en: I’m not allowed to park here.
translations.fr: Je n’ai pas le droit de me garer ici.
translations.vi: Tôi không được đỗ xe ở đây.
translations.ar: لا يُسمح لي بركن السيارة هنا.
translations.hi: मुझे यहां गाड़ी पार्क करने की अनुमति नहीं है.
translations.nb: Jeg har ikke lov til å parkere her.
translations.id: Saya tidak boleh parkir di sini.
translations.ro: Nu am voie să parchez aici.
translations.ja: ここに駐車してはいけません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 1st person singular; expresses permission and selects the infinitive 'parken' as its complement.
Locative adverb modifying the predicate ('parken') indicating place.
Negation particle (polarity: negative) scoping over the predicate; negates the possibility of parking here.
Main verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'darf'.

translations.fr: On se gare derrière le supermarché.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在超市后面停车。
translations.yue: 我哋喺超市後面泊緊車。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đỗ xe phía sau siêu thị.
translations.hi: हम सुपरमार्केट के पीछे गाड़ी पार्क कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Παρκάρουμε πίσω από το σούπερ μάρκετ.
translations.id: Kami sedang parkir di belakang supermarket.
translations.ja: スーパーの裏に駐車しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; predicate of the sentence.
Preposition forming a prepositional phrase of location; with static location it governs the dative case.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; marked by the preposition 'hinter' (location).
Common noun, masculine; head of the prepositional object in dative case: 'hinter dem Supermarkt'.

translations.en: Lara has to park farther up front.
translations.es: Lara tiene que aparcar más adelante.
translations.fr: Lara doit se garer plus loin devant.
translations.zh-Hans: 拉拉得再往前一点停车。
translations.ru: Ларе нужно припарковаться чуть дальше впереди.
translations.pt: A Lara tem que estacionar mais à frente.
translations.he: לארה צריכה לחנות קצת יותר קדימה.
translations.tr: Lara biraz daha ileride park etmek zorunda.
translations.vi: Lara phải đỗ xe lên phía trước một chút nữa.
translations.ar: يجب على لارا أن تركن أبعد قليلًا إلى الأمام.
translations.nl: Lara moet iets verder naar voren parkeren.
translations.uk: Ларі треба припаркуватися трохи далі попереду.
translations.hi: लारा को थोड़ा आगे पार्क करना होगा.
translations.pl: Lara musi zaparkować kawałek dalej, z przodu.
translations.el: Η Λάρα πρέπει να παρκάρει λίγο πιο μπροστά.
translations.nb: Lara må parkere litt lenger framme.
translations.id: Lara harus parkir lebih ke depan.
translations.sv: Lara måste parkera lite längre fram.
translations.ro: Lara trebuie să parcheze mai în față.
translations.da: Lara skal parkere lidt længere fremme.
translations.ja: ララはもう少し前に駐車しないといけません。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun; subject of the clause (nominative).
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; expresses necessity and selects the infinitive 'parken'.
Comparative-degree adverb modifying 'vorne'; intensifies the locative specification ('further in front').
Locative adverb; together with 'weiter' forms an adverbial phrase specifying where to park.
Main verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'muss'.

sentences.target: Ich möchte näher am Eingang parken.

translations.de: Ich möchte näher am Eingang parken.
translations.en: I want to park closer to the entrance.
translations.es: Quiero aparcar más cerca de la entrada.
translations.fr: Je veux me garer plus près de l’entrée.
translations.ko: 입구에 더 가까운 곳에 주차하고 싶어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想把车停在离入口更近的地方。
translations.ru: Я хочу припарковаться поближе к входу.
translations.pt: Quero estacionar mais perto da entrada.
translations.he: אני רוצה לחנות קרוב יותר לכניסה.
translations.tr: Girişe daha yakın park etmek istiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn đỗ xe gần lối vào hơn.
translations.ar: أريد أن أركن أقرب إلى المدخل.
translations.nl: Ik wil dichter bij de ingang parkeren.
translations.uk: Я хочу припаркуватися ближче до входу.
translations.hi: मैं प्रवेश द्वार के पास पार्क करना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θέλω να παρκάρω πιο κοντά στην είσοδο.
translations.id: Saya ingin parkir lebih dekat ke pintu masuk.
translations.ro: Vreau să parchez mai aproape de intrare.
translations.da: Jeg vil gerne parkere tættere på indgangen.
translations.ja: 入口の近くに停めたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, Konjunktiv II (subjunctive) present, 1st person singular; polite/desiderative modality selecting the infinitive 'parken'.
Comparative adverb of degree; modifies the following PP to express relative proximity.
Preposition (contraction of 'an dem'); governs dative case and introduces the PP 'am Eingang'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'am' in dative singular; head of the PP indicating location.
Main verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'möchte'.
